Semantic entity recognition (SER) and relation extraction (RE) are key concepts in Visual information extraction (VIE) tasks, involving entity labeling and entity linking from visually-rich documents.
The F1 score of RE on FUNSD is boosted from 80.35% to 89.45%, showing significant performance improvement.
